surfaces.route: src/index.ts app.get('/join') — validates ?ref= via resolveCode (mirror of /track-record)
served_on: https://algovault.com/join?ref=CODE — apex brand domain, via Caddyfile `handle /join { reverse_proxy localhost:3000 }` (the branded referee landing every web share link points to)
surfaces.purpose: REFERRAL-WEB-FIX-W1 fixes the #1 bug: the old shared link api.algovault.com/signup?ref= 400'd a free friend. /join is a 200 give-get landing whose start-free form carries ref → POST /api/signup-email?ref= → processFreeReferralSignup actually grants the one-time bonus.
surfaces.index_contract: <meta name="robots" content="noindex"> — per-ref transactional landing (don't index ?ref= variants); the indexable referral SEO surface is /referral.
must_contain_valid_ref: A friend gave you 500 bonus calls (SoT-interpolated bonusCallsLabel)
500 one-time bonus calls (kills the recurring misread)
on top of the 100 free calls
C2 share affordance: Copy link + navigator.share + data-sharetext-prefix (referee re-shares — closes the web loop)
must_contain_invalid_ref: Start free with AlgoVault (graceful general landing)
NO data-ref on the form (no bonus granted for an invalid/missing ref)
forbidden_substrings: href="/signup?plan= (apex-relative would 404; must be absolute api)
surfaces.redirect_compat: /signup?ref=CODE (no plan) → 302 https://algovault.com/join?ref=CODE (old shared links keep working); paid /signup?plan=…&ref= checkout UNCHANGED
surfaces.sot_interpolation: bonus number from bonusCallsLabel() (referral-constants SoT); zero hardcoded program-number literals
consumers: shareLink() — every web referral link (signup-email response, welcome email, /account stats, TG-API share_url) now points here
surfaces.error_contract: renderJoinPage is a pure HTML renderer; an invalid ref → graceful general landing (still 200); ref resolve failure is caught → general landing
surfaces.drift_check_command: curl -s 'https://algovault.com/join?ref=<valid>' | grep -q 'gave you' && curl -s 'https://algovault.com/join?ref=<valid>' | grep -q 'api.algovault.com/signup?plan=starter' && ! curl -s 'https://algovault.com/join?ref=<valid>' | grep -qE 'outcome_(return_pct|price)|content="index,follow"'
